programme.title: Comedy Central Radio
programme.desc: The go-to comedy source dishes out uncensored stand-up from their massive library, as well as cutting-edge original content. Hear stand up specials, Roast Week, comedian takeovers and more. With the freshest talent and the biggest names, Comedy Central Radio is guaranteed to beam uncut comedy directly to your brain.

programme.title: Comedy Classics
programme.desc: Classic stand-up from icons of the past, who paved the way for the greats we love today. Timeless comedy that shaped the landscape and defined generations. Featuring legends like Bob Newhart, Joan Rivers, Jackie Gleason and Redd Foxx, as well as exclusive classic archives.

programme.title: Comedy Greats
programme.desc: Comedy Greats plays the best material from the biggest names - from classic comedians of the past to the icons of today. You'll hear comedy legends like Eddie Murphy, Joan Rivers, Kevin Hart, Dave Attell, Sarah Silverman, Jim Gaffigan and more!

programme.title: Comedy Roundup
programme.desc: Jeff Foxworthy and Larry the Cable Guy bring you the best in great American comedy. You'll hear hilarious material from this dynamic duo as well as comedy from some of their personal favorite comedians.

programme.title: Comedy in Full
programme.desc: Comedy in Full delivers a seamless, full-album comedy experience, thoughtfully curated for nonstop laughs and effortless listening. It's the go-to destination for uninterrupted comedy with a refined touch, bringing you complete comedy albums, played as intended, all the time.

programme.title: Conan O'Brien Radio
programme.desc: Conan O'Brien Radio on SiriusXM is home to Conan O'Brien's brand of smart and silly comedy. In addition to exclusive audio content, Conan O'Brien Radio features audio from select Team Coco podcasts including Conan O'Brien Needs a Friend, Inside Conan and Conan O'Brien Needs a Fan. The channel also airs the biggest interviews, funniest stand-up performances and other great moments from Conan's iconic TBS show.

programme.title: HBCU
programme.desc: HBCU is a collective blend of programming from Historically Black Colleges and Universities and offers a unique look into the black college experience. It bridges the gap between alumni, current and prospective students through information and entertainment. HBCU is a resource for students and faculty of each institution to work together to educate and empower. The management and delivery of programming is provided by Howard University's Radio Network, located on the university campus.

programme.title: HUR Voices
programme.desc: HUR Voices is real talk with real music for and from the people. HUR Voices is talk with a purpose that examines and explores issues that affect people of color, and music that combines new and classic soul with R&B for listener enjoyment. HUR Voices programming embodies the mission of Howard University which is to provide 'America and the Global Community' with excellence, leadership, truth and service. Managed by WHUR 96.3 FM, Howard University.

programme.title: MS NOW
programme.desc: MS NOW is a premier destination for breaking news and best-in-class opinion journalism, reaching diverse audiences across cable, online, social, and audio. MS NOW is an essential part of millions of Americans' daily lives, commanding one of the most engaged audiences across all of television with the average viewer watching for more than eight hours each week.

programme.title: Marky Ramone's Punk Rock
programme.desc: Marky Ramone's Punk Rock Blitzkrieg is Classic Punk 24/7 hosted by long-time Ramones drummer Marky Ramone! You'll hear Sex Pistols, Black Flag, Social Distortion, The Clash and of course, The Ramones! All this plus- Songs from Marky's personal music collection, rare recordings, live performances & more! Whether it is Ska-influenced, surf guitar-oriented, Cowpunk, Proto-Punk, Hardcore, or Pop Punk, if it's Classic Punk it's on Marky Ramone’s Punk Rock Blitzkrieg!

programme.desc: Ride the lightning 24/7 through Metallica's heaviest hits, rare tracks, epic live concerts, unfiltered stories, and fan-fueled fire! The Metallica family unites here, louder, faster, and heavier than ever. The most Metallica anywhere!

programme.title: Radio Classics
programme.desc: Radio Classics is the home for the quality programs from The Golden Age Of Radio. Before television, before audio books, before podcasts, great storytelling dominated the realm of radio. It's where imagination ruled. Superman, Dragnet, Gunsmoke, plus comedies from Jack Benny, Bob Hope, Lucille Ball, George Burns & Gracie Allen all originated on radio. Those ageless shows (and so much more) can be found on Radio Classics. Timeless stories and laughs from the past for today's SiriusXM listeners.

programme.title: SiriusXM FC
programme.desc: SiriusXM FC is dedicated entirely to the world's most popular sport, soccer. The channel features an extensive schedule of live matches from the Premier League, Major League Soccer, UEFA Champions League and the FA Cup. Plus, hear a daily lineup of soccer talk programming hosted by former players and coaches including Ray Hudson, Tony Meola, and Rodney Marsh.

programme.title: SiriusXM NBA Radio
programme.desc: SiriusXM NBA Radio delivers expert analysis and up-to-the minute NBA news that true basketball fans need - 24/7/365. From the NBA Draft to the NBA Finals, SiriusXM NBA Radio has all of your pro basketball needs covered. Listen as former players and coaches take your calls and address all the latest NBA news. The best basketball talk and the biggest NBA games can all be found on one channel, SiriusXM NBA Radio.

programme.title: SiriusXM NFL Radio
programme.desc: SiriusXM NFL Radio delivers hard-hitting analysis and up-to-the minute NFL news that true football fanatics need - 24/7/365. From the annual Training Camp Tour from all 32 teams, to Super Bowl Week broadcasts, to the Scouting Combine remotes, to live coverage of every pick of the NFL Draft, an all-pro lineup of hosts and special guests from around the league keep you in the know. Think you got game? Call us at 877-NFL-KICK.

programme.title: SiriusXM Pops
programme.desc: Classical Music's greatest hits performed by the world's most renowned orchestras and soloists. Including Yo-Yo Ma, 2Cellos and The Boston Pops Orchestra. Featuring works by Beethoven, Mozart, Bach and John Williams.

programme.desc: SiriusXM Preview

programme.title: SiriusXM Progress
programme.desc: SiriusXM Progress amplifies voices demanding justice, equality, and liberty for all. Hear progressive viewpoints from a wide range of voices including Zerlina Maxwell, Stephanie Miller, Thom Hartmann, Michelangelo Signorile, Dean Obeidallah, John Fugelsang, and more.

programme.title: SiriusXM SEC Radio
programme.desc: Your home for SEC sports talk, analysis and live play-by-play, including football, men's and women's basketball, baseball, softball and men's and women's soccer.

programme.title: SiriusXM Scoreboard
programme.desc: Final sports scores every 10 minutes, along with news, notes, and information from all your favorite sporting events, including NFL, NHL, NBA, and MLB. Get caught up on all the scores and action from all around the world, 24/7, including up-to-date information and interviews from all SiriusXM sports channels, all in a tight 10 minute wheel.

programme.title: SiriusXM Silk 330
programme.desc: Classic R&B love songs from Prince, Luther Vandross, Anita Baker, Maxwell and more.

programme.desc: Rock sounds of the south

programme.title: SiriusXM Turbo
programme.desc: 90s and 2000s hard rock from Metallica, KoRn, Godsmack, Disturbed, Linkin Park and more!

programme.title: SiriusXM Urban View
programme.desc: Urban View features dynamic discourse from prominent Black voices on topics ranging from civil rights, politics, pop culture, faith, tech, financial wellness, and more. Join Karen Hunter, Clay Cane, Lurie Daniel Favors, Rev. Al Sharpton, Lou Hutt, Wilmer Leon, Reecie Colbert, Shermichael Singleton and many more voices as they bring you powerful and engaging conversation.

programme.title: SiriusXMU
programme.desc: Groundbreaking music and emerging artists. A commercial-free mix of new music from up-and-coming bands and producers, together with the indie classics that inspired them.

programme.title: SiriusXMU Discovery
programme.desc: New emerging indie rock

programme.title: SiriusXO
programme.desc: Love songs 90s - now. The soundtrack to your modern love story. Find your feels with beats straight from the hearts of artists like Bruno Mars, Taylor Swift, John Mayer, Mariah Carey, Michael Bublé and more!

programme.title: Siriusly Sinatra
programme.desc: The Chairman of the Board is at home everyday on Siriusly Sinatra, along with Dean Martin, Tony Bennett and more of the great singers interpreting the Great American Songbook. Siriusly Sinatra is the 24-hour home for all things Frank and the standards he made famous!

programme.title: Skate Shop
programme.desc: Asphalt anthems

programme.title: SmartLess Radio
programme.desc: SmartLess Radio is the destination for 24/7 SmartLess! 'SmartLess' with Jason Bateman, Sean Hayes & Will Arnett is a podcast that connects and unites people from all walks of life to learn about shared experiences through thoughtful dialogue and organic hilarity. In each episode of SmartLess, one of the hosts reveals his mystery guest to the other two. What ensues is a genuinely improvised and authentic conversation filled with laughter and newfound knowledge to feed the SmartLess mind.

programme.title: Smokey's Soul Town
programme.desc: Classic Soul, R&B & Motown from the '60s and '70s live in Smokey's Soul Town! Throughout the day, Smokey shares stories from his career and picks some of his favorites from Hitsville and beyond. Plus hosted DJ shows from The Motown Museum in Detroit. Stevie, Aretha, Otis, Marvin, Jackie, Chaka, The Temptations, The Miracles, The Supremes, The Four Tops and all the Soul you can handle... 24/7 on Smokey's Soul Town!!

programme.title: SoulCycle Radio
programme.desc: There's a reason we ride to the rhythm as a pack. At SoulCycle, music is what connects us, moves us, and inspires us. So we designed this channel to deliver the same joy, motivation, and heart-pumping beat you expect from us in class-and then some. Whether you're in the car, walking to work, or dancing in your bedroom, turn it up for a transformative mind-body-soul experience.

programme.title: SoundCloud Radio
programme.desc: From the biggest names in hip-hop to tomorrow's breakout stars, SoundCloud is where artists get their start and new music lands first. And now when you're not on SoundCloud, you don't have to press pause on your bars, beats or discovery. Just tune in to SiriusXM to hear all the SoundCloud hip-hop hits that paved the way and new tracks driving culture today.

programme.title: Stars
programme.desc: Hear SiriusXM's biggest stars in intimate and revealing conversations about life and culture, share lifechanging advice, and real talk with friends. Culture and celebrity collide to bring you inside the life and style of Hollywood.

programme.title: Steve Aoki's Remix Radio
programme.desc: Dance Music icon, Entrepreneur, fashion mogul, & Label Head of Dim Mak Records, Steve Aoki has launched his own channel on SiriusXM. Steve has decided to curate a SiriusXM channel dedicated to remixes. Steve Aoki's Remix Radio will feature dance remixes of the top pop & dance hits, Steve Aoki original tracks PLUS you'll hear all of Steve's favorite songs handpicked by him

programme.title: Stevie's Coolest Songs
programme.desc: From the first by Joey Ramone, to the latest by the Cocktail Slippers, hear every Coolest Song in the World from Little Steven's Underground Garage! From the bands that broke through like Green Day & the White Stripes, to the classic artists making records today like Paul McCartney and Jeff Beck, to the Coolest Songs made five minutes ago in the garage!

programme.title: Strings

programme.title: The 10s Spot
programme.desc: Perfect 10s all day, every day! Hits from the 2010s decade including Taylor Swift to Drake, Fall Out Boy, Lady Gaga, Justin Timberlake, Adele, Coldplay, Rihanna and more! A definitive community bonded by emoji's, social media and 10s pop hits! We're not stuck in the 10s, we like it here!

programme.title: The 2Pac Channel
programme.desc: Rock The Bells Radio presents The 2Pac Channel, celebrating the music, message, and lasting influence of Tupac Shakur. Hear iconic hits, deep album cuts, live recordings, rare collaborations, and exclusive stories reflecting on Pac's life and impact on hip-hop culture.

programme.title: The Beatles Channel
programme.desc: The Beatles were the big bang of pop! They created the musical world we live in today. Now, for the first time, the most popular band in history presents their own channel. All things Beatles, 24/8. All of their hits, album tracks, live recordings, rarities & solo songs, along with the records that influenced them & music inspired by them. Plus interviews & exclusive hosted shows. It's the soundtrack for generations of music fans....provided by John, Paul, George, and Ringo.

programme.title: The Big Easy
programme.desc: The sounds of New Orleans

programme.title: The Billy Graham Channel
programme.desc: The Billy Graham Channel gives SiriusXM listeners access to the preacher's timeless messages from seven decades of ministry as well as reflections from friends and family.

programme.title: The Blend
programme.desc: Blending nice & easy pop where you can sing along with Rod Stewart, Celine Dion, Lionel Richie, Neil Diamond, Whitney Houston and more! Feeling good has never been easier!

programme.title: The Bridge
programme.desc: Cross the bridge to the mellow side of classic rock and 70s folk rock. The Eagles, James Taylor, Fleetwood Mac, Simon & Garfunkel and more.

programme.title: The Bridge Deep Cuts
programme.desc: The depth of The Bridge

programme.title: The Catholic Channel
programme.desc: Talk about it on The Catholic Channel! Combining a modern talk format and open dialogue, The Catholic Channel focuses on Catholicism in the 21st century, especially as it is lived in today's world. Cardinal Timothy Dolan leads a list of modern voices, including Fr. Dave Dwyer, Lino Rulli, Gus Lloyd, Katie McGrady, and more.

programme.title: The Chairman's Lounge
programme.desc: Hip hangout with Sinatra

programme.title: The Coffee House
programme.desc: A laid-back mix of acoustic and stripped down songs that invite you to settle in and unplug from the world outside. Relax to a diverse selection of hits, new discoveries and acoustic classics.

programme.title: The Covers Channel
programme.desc: 24/7 cover songs

programme.title: The Elevator
programme.desc: A score for every floor

programme.title: The Emo Project

programme.title: The Flow
programme.desc: Remember how you felt the first time you heard Beyonce's first solo album? How about the chills that ran down your spine when you heard that CTRL album from SZA? If you do, then you'll be all about THE FLOW! It's all about those good R&B vibes from the 2000s and 2010s. The biggest hits in R&B since the turn of the millennium!

programme.title: The Groove
programme.desc: Get your groove on with Old School R&B. Hear the important artists from the '70s and '80s including Michael Jackson, Luther Vandross, Janet Jackson, EW&F, Isley Brothers, the Gap Band and more.

programme.title: The Heat
programme.desc: The Heat stays lit with the hottest R&B and hip-hop, with artists like Chris Brown, Cardi B., SZA, Drake, Doja Cat, Lil' Baby and more!

programme.title: The Highway
programme.desc: Discover the next generation of country superstars on The Highway - where breakthrough Highway Finds meet brand new music from country's biggest hitmakers. Hosted weekdays by Cody Alan, Macie Banks, Buzz Brainard and Ania Hammar from the heart of Broadway in downtown Nashville, Tennessee.

programme.title: The Indigiverse
programme.desc: Welcome to the Indigiverse! Music, news and views from Turtle Island! You'll hear artists like William Prince, A Tribe Called Red, Riit and Snotty Nose Rez Kids, and hosts Kim Wheeler and Kaylen Belair.

programme.title: The Jeff Lewis Channel
programme.desc: Hear the archives, plus exclusive content from your favorite guests and Chumps. It's great news for you, but a nightmare for our lawyers.

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Connection
programme.desc: The Kelly Clarkson universe hits the airwaves with The Kelly Clarkson Connection! Make yourself comfortable in Kelly's world - you'll be surrounded by the music she loves, music she's inspired by and the stories behind the songs in Kelly's two-decade long catalog of award-winning hits. Experience the chemistry of The Kelly Clarkson Connection!

programme.title: The Loft
programme.desc: Eclectic rock and rhythm from all-time legends and up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: The Megyn Kelly Channel
programme.desc: The Megyn Kelly Channel is your home for bold, no B.S. news. We don't suffer fools, but we love mocking them! All facts, no apologies. Hear open, honest, and provocative conversations with Megyn, plus other contributors.

programme.desc: Praise and worship music

programme.desc: Today's pop music keeping you company through your day. Hear the hits, throwbacks and fresh sounds Taylor Swift, Ed Sheeran, OneRepublic, Ariana Grande and more.

programme.title: The Sleep Channel
programme.desc: Ambient music & sleep sounds

programme.title: The Spectrum

programme.title: The Tragically Hip Radio

programme.title: The Village
